title: imagebuildah: fix handling of destinations that end with '/'
body: Don't lose track of whether or not the specified destination for an ADD or COPY instruction ends with the path separator, which is important.

comments.body: hmm, thought we'd an issue logged against Bulidah for this very problem but can't find it.

:pushpin: Commit f77b452 has been approved by `TomSweeneyRedHat`
